description: Curated bundled species database for Open Garden Planner. Single source of truth for both species records (pH, NPK demand, sun/water, growth, hardiness) and planting-calendar timing (sow/transplant/harvest weeks relative to last frost). Calendar windows are weeks relative to last frost (negative = before). Harvest windows are weeks after planting/transplanting. NPK demand levels are categorical (high/medium/low/fixer). pH ranges are mineral-soil targets, not absolute hard limits. Records are intended for typical temperate-climate gardens; refine per local conditions.
sources: RHS — Royal Horticultural Society plant profiles
Cornell University Cooperative Extension (vegetable growing guides)
University of Minnesota Extension (vegetable nutrient management)
Oregon State University Extension (commercial vegetable production)
